# INStartCallCallCapabilityUnsupportedReason.cameraNotAccessible

**Case**

The camera isn’t accessible.

## Declaration

```swift
case cameraNotAccessible
```

## Constants

- **INStartCallCallCapabilityUnsupportedReason.videoCallUnsupported**: The app doesn’t support video calls.
- **INStartCallCallCapabilityUnsupportedReason.microphoneNotAccessible**: The microphone isn’t accessible.

items.description: The app doesn’t support video calls.
